name: Preserve human life
description: Prioritize saving lives above all other objectives including property and cost

name: Operational efficiency
description: Complete mission with minimal resource expenditure and time

name: Team safety priority
description: Never compromise rescuer safety even for mission success

name: Transparency and communication
description: Maintain clear information flow to all stakeholders

name: Evidence-based decision making
description: Base decisions on data and expert assessment rather than assumptions

name: Rapid response imperative
description: Act quickly to maximize survival chances even with incomplete information

name: Resource stewardship
description: Preserve equipment and supplies for future missions

name: Accountability and documentation
description: Maintain accurate records for learning and legal protection

name: Community trust
description: Build public confidence through professional conduct
